docString:
A tactic used to automatically discharge goals relating to the continuous functional calculus,
specifically whether the element satisfies the predicate.

ref.pp:
/-- A tactic used to automatically discharge goals relating to the continuous functional calculus,
specifically whether the element satisfies the predicate. -/
@[tactic_parser 1000]
public meta def cfcTac : Lean.ParserDescrâśť :=
  ParserDescr.nodeâśť `cfcTac 1024 (ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbolâśť "cfc_tac" falseâśť)

@[macro cfcTac]
public meta def _aux_Mathlib_Tactic_ContinuousFunctionalCalculus___macroRules_cfcTac_1 : Macroâśť := fun
  | `(tactic| cfc_tac) =>
    `(tactic|
      try
        (first
          | assumption
          | infer_instance
          | aesop  (rule_sets := [$(Lean.mkIdent `CStarAlgebra):ident])))
      -- we may want to try using `fun_prop` directly in the future.
      
  | _ => no_error_if_unused% throwâśť Lean.Macro.Exception.unsupportedSyntaxâśť

docString:
A tactic used to automatically discharge goals relating to the continuous functional calculus,
specifically concerning continuity of the functions involved.

ref.pp:
/-- A tactic used to automatically discharge goals relating to the continuous functional calculus,
specifically concerning continuity of the functions involved. -/
@[tactic_parser 1000]
public meta def cfcContTac : Lean.ParserDescrâśť :=
  ParserDescr.nodeâśť `cfcContTac 1024 (ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbolâśť "cfc_cont_tac" falseâśť)

@[macro cfcContTac]
public meta def _aux_Mathlib_Tactic_ContinuousFunctionalCalculus___macroRules_cfcContTac_1 : Macroâśť := fun
  | `(tactic| cfc_cont_tac) =>
    `(tactic|
      try
        (first
          |
            fun_prop (disch :=
              aesop  (config := { warnOnNonterminal := false })  (rule_sets := [$(Lean.mkIdent `CStarAlgebra):ident]))
          | assumption))
  | _ => no_error_if_unused% throwâśť Lean.Macro.Exception.unsupportedSyntaxâśť

docString:
A tactic used to automatically discharge goals relating to the non-unital continuous functional
calculus, specifically concerning whether `f 0 = 0`.
